I'm now focusing on adding some key visual details for the new character. We need to flesh out the design, going from simple shapes to a more distinctive character. I'm now refining the player and projectile logic, taking into account the new mouse aiming system and the updated player visuals. I'm also updating the `Player` interface in `types.ts` to accommodate the rotation. This is also when I am switching to XML.

I'm making the last changes to the inputs and display. I'm updating the instructions in the menu, transitioning to XML, and integrating the rotation variable into the `Player` interface. I'm also now updating the `GameCanvas.tsx` component to handle the updated inputs and update loop, with special attention to how the player rotates, which is based on the mouse's position. My focus is on ensuring a consistent user experience with the new controls.
